system.description: When you **_craft a protective charm for someone_**, spend 1 Stock and name a source of harm (fire, stabbing, etc.). When **_they would suffer such harm while bearing your charm_**, roll +INT: **on a 10+**, they ignore the harm entirely; **_on a 7-9_**, they suffer only half the damage or effect; **on a 6-**, they suffer the harm normally. One can benefit from only 1 charm at a time, and it loses its potency after 1 use.

partial.value: They suffer only half the damage or effect.
